pathways.name: visionOS Genesis Path
pathways.description: Build your first visionOS app from zero. Start with the platform overview, develop a first immersive scene, learn ARKit's new spatial APIs, then add RealityKit content and Reality Composer Pro authoring.

pathways.name: SwiftData Migration Path
pathways.description: Adopt SwiftData for new apps or migrate existing Core Data code. Learn the core concepts, schema modeling, hands-on usage with SwiftUI, deeper persistence operations, and migration strategies.

pathways.name: Swift Macros Path
pathways.description: Master Swift 5.9 macros from concept to authorship. Start with the Swift overview, then write your first macro, then go deep on macro roles, hygiene, and the SwiftSyntax tree.

pathways.name: Observation Adoption Path
pathways.description: Replace ObservableObject with @Observable across your SwiftUI app. Understand the macro, the simplified property-wrapper rules, and how it composes with SwiftData.

pathways.name: SwiftUI Animation Overhaul
pathways.description: Adopt the new keyframe and phase animator APIs, native springs, visual effects, and scroll transitions. Covers the complete 2023 animation refresh.

pathways.name: Interactive Widgets & Live Activities
pathways.description: Ship widgets that respond to user input via App Intents, including Live Activities with push updates and the watchOS 10 Smart Stack.

pathways.name: Xcode 15 Productivity Path
pathways.description: Get the full benefit of Xcode 15: programmatic previews, string catalogs, structured logging, mergeable libraries, and improved test reports.

pathways.name: RealityKit Deep Dive
pathways.description: Master RealityKit on visionOS from entities and components, through Reality Composer Pro authoring, custom systems, and performance.

pathways.name: Spatial Design Mastery
pathways.description: Design visionOS apps that feel native and comfortable: spatial input, vision/motion considerations, sound design, and SharePlay layout patterns.

pathways.name: Swift Concurrency Beyond Basics
pathways.description: Go deeper into structured concurrency: discarding task groups, custom actor executors, cancellation patterns, and integration with C++ codebases.

pathways.name: On-Device ML Path
pathways.description: Ship ML features in your app: Core ML async prediction, model compression, multilingual NLP, and Vision/Camera integrations.

pathways.name: watchOS 10 Adoption
pathways.description: Adopt the watchOS 10 redesign: full-screen color, vertical navigation, Smart Stack widgets, and the new container background API.

pathways.name: Accessibility Champion Path
pathways.description: Make your app inclusive: cognitive accessibility via Assistive Access, accessibility audits in tests, custom voices, and modern SwiftUI/UIKit accessibility APIs.

pathways.name: Game Porting to Mac
pathways.description: Use the Game Porting Toolkit to evaluate Windows games on Mac, then port shaders and rendering to Metal 3 with ray tracing.
